1	import * as Solid from 'solid-js'
2	import warning from 'tiny-warning'
3	import { CatchBoundary, ErrorComponent } from './CatchBoundary'
4	import { useRouterState } from './useRouterState'
5	import { useRouter } from './useRouter'
6	import { Transitioner } from './Transitioner'
7	import { matchContext } from './matchContext'
8	import { Match } from './Match'
9	import { SafeFragment } from './SafeFragment'
10	import type {
11	  AnyRouter,
12	  DeepPartial,
13	  Expand,
14	  MakeOptionalPathParams,
15	  MakeOptionalSearchParams,
16	  MakeRouteMatchUnion,
17	  MaskOptions,
18	  MatchRouteOptions,
19	  NoInfer,
20	  RegisteredRouter,
21	  ResolveRelativePath,
22	  ResolveRoute,
23	  RouteByPath,
24	  RouterState,
25	  ToSubOptionsProps,
26	} from '@tanstack/router-core'
27	
28	declare module '@tanstack/router-core' {
29	  export interface RouteMatchExtensions {
30	    meta?: Array<Solid.JSX.IntrinsicElements['meta'] | undefined>
31	    links?: Array<Solid.JSX.IntrinsicElements['link'] | undefined>
32	    scripts?: Array<Solid.JSX.IntrinsicElements['script'] | undefined>
33	    styles?: Array<Solid.JSX.IntrinsicElements['style'] | undefined>
34	    headScripts?: Array<Solid.JSX.IntrinsicElements['script'] | undefined>
35	  }
36	}
37	
38	export function Matches() {
39	  const router = useRouter()
40	
41	  const pendingElement = router.options.defaultPendingComponent ? (
42	    <router.options.defaultPendingComponent />
43	  ) : null
44	
45	  // Do not render a root Suspense during SSR or hydrating from SSR
46	  const ResolvedSuspense =
47	    router.isServer || (typeof document !== 'undefined' && router.ssr)
48	      ? SafeFragment
49	      : Solid.Suspense
50	
51	  const inner = (
52	    <ResolvedSuspense fallback={pendingElement}>
53	      {!router.isServer && <Transitioner />}
54	      <MatchesInner />
55	    </ResolvedSuspense>
56	  )
57	
58	  return router.options.InnerWrap ? (
59	    <router.options.InnerWrap>{inner}</router.options.InnerWrap>
60	  ) : (
61	    inner
62	  )
63	}
64	
65	function MatchesInner() {
66	  const router = useRouter()
67	  const matchId = useRouterState({
68	    select: (s) => {
69	      return s.matches[0]?.id
70	    },
71	  })
72	
73	  const resetKey = useRouterState({
74	    select: (s) => s.loadedAt,
75	  })
76	
77	  const matchComponent = () =>
78	    matchId() ? <Match matchId={matchId()!} /> : null
79	
80	  return (
81	    <matchContext.Provider value={matchId}>
82	      {router.options.disableGlobalCatchBoundary ? (
83	        matchComponent()
84	      ) : (
85	        <CatchBoundary
86	          getResetKey={() => resetKey()}
87	          errorComponent={ErrorComponent}
88	          onCatch={(error) => {
89	            warning(
90	              false,
91	              `The following error wasn't caught by any route! At the very least, consider setting an 'errorComponent' in your RootRoute!`,
92	            )
93	            warning(false, error.message || error.toString())
94	          }}
95	        >
96	          {matchComponent()}
97	        </CatchBoundary>
98	      )}
99	    </matchContext.Provider>
100	  )
101	}
102	
103	export type UseMatchRouteOptions<
104	  TRouter extends AnyRouter = RegisteredRouter,
105	  TFrom extends string = string,
106	  TTo extends string | undefined = undefined,
107	  TMaskFrom extends string = TFrom,
108	  TMaskTo extends string = '',
109	> = ToSubOptionsProps<TRouter, TFrom, TTo> &
110	  DeepPartial<MakeOptionalSearchParams<TRouter, TFrom, TTo>> &
111	  DeepPartial<MakeOptionalPathParams<TRouter, TFrom, TTo>> &
112	  MaskOptions<TRouter, TMaskFrom, TMaskTo> &
113	  MatchRouteOptions
114	
115	export function useMatchRoute<TRouter extends AnyRouter = RegisteredRouter>() {
116	  const router = useRouter()
117	
118	  const status = useRouterState({
119	    select: (s) => s.status,
120	  })
121	
122	  return <
123	    const TFrom extends string = string,
124	    const TTo extends string | undefined = undefined,
125	    const TMaskFrom extends string = TFrom,
126	    const TMaskTo extends string = '',
127	  >(
128	    opts: UseMatchRouteOptions<TRouter, TFrom, TTo, TMaskFrom, TMaskTo>,
129	  ): Solid.Accessor<
130	    false | Expand<ResolveRoute<TRouter, TFrom, TTo>['types']['allParams']>
131	  > => {
132	    const { pending, caseSensitive, fuzzy, includeSearch, ...rest } = opts
133	
134	    const matchRoute = Solid.createMemo(() => {
135	      status()
136	      return router.matchRoute(rest as any, {
137	        pending,
138	        caseSensitive,
139	        fuzzy,
140	        includeSearch,
141	      })
142	    })
143	
144	    return matchRoute
145	  }
146	}
147	
148	export type MakeMatchRouteOptions<
149	  TRouter extends AnyRouter = RegisteredRouter,
150	  TFrom extends string = string,
151	  TTo extends string | undefined = undefined,
152	  TMaskFrom extends string = TFrom,
153	  TMaskTo extends string = '',
154	> = UseMatchRouteOptions<TRouter, TFrom, TTo, TMaskFrom, TMaskTo> & {
155	  // If a function is passed as a child, it will be given the `isActive` boolean to aid in further styling on the element it returns
156	  children?:
157	    | ((
158	        params?: RouteByPath<
159	          TRouter['routeTree'],
160	          ResolveRelativePath<TFrom, NoInfer<TTo>>
161	        >['types']['allParams'],
162	      ) => Solid.JSX.Element)
163	    | Solid.JSX.Element
164	}
165	
166	export function MatchRoute<
167	  TRouter extends AnyRouter = RegisteredRouter,
168	  const TFrom extends string = string,
169	  const TTo extends string | undefined = undefined,
170	  const TMaskFrom extends string = TFrom,
171	  const TMaskTo extends string = '',
172	>(props: MakeMatchRouteOptions<TRouter, TFrom, TTo, TMaskFrom, TMaskTo>): any {
173	  const status = useRouterState({
174	    select: (s) => s.status,
175	  })
176	
177	  return (
178	    <Solid.Show when={status()} keyed>
179	      {(_) => {
180	        const matchRoute = useMatchRoute()
181	        const params = matchRoute(props as any)() as boolean
182	        const child = props.children
183	        if (typeof child === 'function') {
184	          return (child as any)(params)
185	        }
186	
187	        return params ? child : null
188	      }}
189	    </Solid.Show>
190	  )
191	}
192	
193	export interface UseMatchesBaseOptions<TRouter extends AnyRouter, TSelected> {
194	  select?: (matches: Array<MakeRouteMatchUnion<TRouter>>) => TSelected
195	}
196	
197	export type UseMatchesResult<
198	  TRouter extends AnyRouter,
199	  TSelected,
200	> = unknown extends TSelected ? Array<MakeRouteMatchUnion<TRouter>> : TSelected
201	
202	export function useMatches<
203	  TRouter extends AnyRouter = RegisteredRouter,
204	  TSelected = unknown,
205	>(
206	  opts?: UseMatchesBaseOptions<TRouter, TSelected>,
207	): Solid.Accessor<UseMatchesResult<TRouter, TSelected>> {
208	  return useRouterState({
209	    select: (state: RouterState<TRouter['routeTree']>) => {
210	      const matches = state.matches
211	      return opts?.select
212	        ? opts.select(matches as Array<MakeRouteMatchUnion<TRouter>>)
213	        : matches
214	    },
215	  } as any) as Solid.Accessor<UseMatchesResult<TRouter, TSelected>>
216	}
217	
218	export function useParentMatches<
219	  TRouter extends AnyRouter = RegisteredRouter,
220	  TSelected = unknown,
221	>(
222	  opts?: UseMatchesBaseOptions<TRouter, TSelected>,
223	): Solid.Accessor<UseMatchesResult<TRouter, TSelected>> {
224	  const contextMatchId = Solid.useContext(matchContext)
225	
226	  return useMatches({
227	    select: (matches: Array<MakeRouteMatchUnion<TRouter>>) => {
228	      matches = matches.slice(
229	        0,
230	        matches.findIndex((d) => d.id === contextMatchId()),
231	      )
232	      return opts?.select ? opts.select(matches) : matches
233	    },
234	  } as any)
235	}
236	
237	export function useChildMatches<
238	  TRouter extends AnyRouter = RegisteredRouter,
239	  TSelected = unknown,
240	>(
241	  opts?: UseMatchesBaseOptions<TRouter, TSelected>,
242	): Solid.Accessor<UseMatchesResult<TRouter, TSelected>> {
243	  const contextMatchId = Solid.useContext(matchContext)
244	
245	  return useMatches({
246	    select: (matches: Array<MakeRouteMatchUnion<TRouter>>) => {
247	      matches = matches.slice(
248	        matches.findIndex((d) => d.id === contextMatchId()) + 1,
249	      )
250	      return opts?.select ? opts.select(matches) : matches
251	    },
252	  } as any)
253	}

Next I’ll inspect existing Solid tests and package scripts to add a focused regression test temporarily.

42	export function Matches() {

44	
45	  const pendingElement = router.options.defaultPendingComponent ? (
46	    <router.options.defaultPendingComponent />
47	  ) : null
48	
49	  // Do not render a root Suspense during SSR or hydrating from SSR
50	  const ResolvedSuspense =

60	  )

82

1	import * as React from 'react'
2	import { Matches } from './Matches'
3	import { getRouterContext } from './routerContext'
4	import type {
5	  AnyRouter,
6	  RegisteredRouter,
7	  RouterOptions,
8	} from '@tanstack/router-core'
9	
10	export function RouterContextProvider<
11	  TRouter extends AnyRouter = RegisteredRouter,
12	  TDehydrated extends Record<string, any> = Record<string, any>,
13	>({
14	  router,
15	  children,
16	  ...rest
17	}: RouterProps<TRouter, TDehydrated> & {
18	  children: React.ReactNode
19	}) {
20	  if (Object.keys(rest).length > 0) {
21	    // Allow the router to update options on the router instance
22	    router.update({
23	      ...router.options,
24	      ...rest,
25	      context: {
26	        ...router.options.context,
27	        ...rest.context,
28	      },
29	    } as any)
30	  }
31	
32	  const routerContext = getRouterContext()
33	
34	  const provider = (
35	    <routerContext.Provider value={router as AnyRouter}>
36	      {children}
37	    </routerContext.Provider>
38	  )
39	
40	  if (router.options.Wrap) {
41	    return <router.options.Wrap>{provider}</router.options.Wrap>
42	  }
43	
44	  return provider
45	}
46	
47	export function RouterProvider<
48	  TRouter extends AnyRouter = RegisteredRouter,
49	  TDehydrated extends Record<string, any> = Record<string, any>,
50	>({ router, ...rest }: RouterProps<TRouter, TDehydrated>) {
51	  return (
52	    <RouterContextProvider router={router} {...rest}>
53	      <Matches />
54	    </RouterContextProvider>
55	  )
56	}
57	
58	export type RouterProps<
59	  TRouter extends AnyRouter = RegisteredRouter,
60	  TDehydrated extends Record<string, any> = Record<string, any>,
61	> = Omit<
62	  RouterOptions<
63	    TRouter['routeTree'],
64	    NonNullable<TRouter['options']['trailingSlash']>,
65	    NonNullable<TRouter['options']['defaultStructuralSharing']>,
66	    TRouter['history'],
67	    TDehydrated
68	  >,
69	  'context'
70	> & {

72	  context?: Partial<
73	    RouterOptions<
74	      TRouter['routeTree'],
75	      NonNullable<TRouter['options']['trailingSlash']>,
76	      NonNullable<TRouter['options']['defaultStructuralSharing']>,
77	      TRouter['history'],

Implemented the fix for Solid Router wrapping behavior.

What changed:
- Updated `packages/solid-router/src/RouterProvider.tsx`
  - `Wrap` now receives a component child (`<Inner />`) instead of an already-evaluated JSX value, so Solid context from `Wrap` properly scopes over the router subtree.
- Updated `packages/solid-router/src/Matches.tsx`
  - `InnerWrap` now similarly wraps a component child instead of pre-created JSX, allowing contexts like `QueryClientProvider` to be visible to matched route components.

Validation:
- Added temporary regression tests proving:
  - `Wrap` provides context to matched route components.
  - `InnerWrap` provides context to matched route components.
  - Wrapped route components still dispose correctly on unmount.
- Confirmed the regression tests failed before the fix and passed after.
- Deleted the temporary regression test file as requested.
- Ran targeted existing tests after cleanup:

```bash
pnpm --dir /testbed --filter @tanstack/solid-router exec vitest run tests/Matches.test.tsx tests/router.test.tsx
```

Result:
- 2 test files passed
- 106 tests passed
- No type errors

Also ran:

```bash
git -C /testbed diff --check
```

No formatting/whitespace issues were reported.
